meta.title: Contact
meta.description: Talk to Ponte. Bring a deal to the desk, book a senior analyst, or scope a strategy intensive or retainer.

lead.default: Tell us the deal on your desk, or the decision you are weighing. The desk replies within one business day.
lead.strategyIntensive: You are after a Strategy Intensive: a half-day with a senior analyst and a written brief. Tell us the decision and we will scope it.
lead.retainer: You are considering a Trade Desk Retainer: a standing analyst on call. Tell us the cadence and the kinds of questions you expect, and we will propose a monthly block.

deal.title: Bring us a deal
deal.body: An offer or a requirement, goods or trade services. Facts only, papered before any introduction.

email.title: Email us
email.body: For intensives, retainers, or anything bespoke. Tell us the decision and we will scope it.
email.subject: Enquiry: {topic}
